label: Health condition
description: Defines a health condition, injury, disease, implant, or other hediff that can be applied to a pawn.

hediffClass.label: Hediff class
hediffClass.description: C# Hediff subclass used at runtime.

comps.label: Components
comps.description: List of HediffCompProperties that attach modular behaviors.

descriptionShort.label: Short description
descriptionShort.description: Brief description shown in compact UI contexts.

debugLabelExtra.label: Debug label extra
debugLabelExtra.description: Extra text appended to the label in debug mode.

initialSeverity.label: Initial severity
initialSeverity.description: Starting severity when applied without an explicit value.

lethalSeverity.label: Lethal severity
lethalSeverity.description: Severity at which this hediff kills the pawn. -1 means never lethal by severity.

stages.label: Stages
stages.description: Ordered list of stages. Active stage determined by severity.

tendable.label: Tendable
tendable.description: If true, doctors can tend this hediff to slow progression.

isBad.label: Is bad
isBad.description: If true, this hediff is harmful. Used to prioritize treatment.

spawnThingOnRemoved.label: Spawn thing on removed
spawnThingOnRemoved.description: ThingDef spawned when this hediff is removed.

chanceToCauseNoPain.label: Chance to cause no pain
chanceToCauseNoPain.description: Probability (0–1) that this hediff produces no pain despite stage pain settings.

canApplyDodChanceForCapacityChanges.label: Can apply dodge chance for capacity changes
canApplyDodChanceForCapacityChanges.description: If true, moving pawns may dodge capacity changes from this hediff.

makesSickThought.label: Makes sick thought
makesSickThought.description: If true, colonists get a mood debuff for seeing a colonist with this hediff.

makesAlert.label: Makes alert
makesAlert.description: If true, an alert is shown when a colonist has this hediff.

chemicalNeed.label: Chemical need
chemicalNeed.description: NeedDef satisfied when used as a drug effect.

minSeverity.label: Min severity
minSeverity.description: Hediff is removed when severity drops below this value.

maxSeverity.label: Max severity
maxSeverity.description: Severity is clamped to this maximum. Defaults to uncapped (float.MaxValue) when omitted.

scenarioCanAdd.label: Scenario can add
scenarioCanAdd.description: If true, this hediff can be added as a scenario starting condition.

hediffGivers.label: Hediff givers
hediffGivers.description: Givers that spontaneously add secondary hediffs while this hediff is active.

cureAllAtOnceIfCuredByItem.label: Cure all at once if cured by item
cureAllAtOnceIfCuredByItem.description: If true, all instances are removed at once when an item cures it.

taleOnVisible.label: Tale on visible
taleOnVisible.description: TaleDef recorded when this hediff becomes visible for the first time.

recordDownedTale.label: Record downed tale
recordDownedTale.description: If true, a tale is recorded when this hediff downs the pawn.

everCurableByItem.label: Ever curable by item
everCurableByItem.description: If false, no item or surgery can ever cure this hediff.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: String tags used for grouping and removal operations.

priceImpact.label: Price impact
priceImpact.description: If true, this hediff affects the pawn's market value.

priceOffset.label: Price offset
priceOffset.description: Silver value added to pawn market price while this hediff is present.

chronic.label: Chronic
chronic.description: If true, treated as a chronic condition that cannot be fully healed without surgery.

keepOnBodyPartRestoration.label: Keep on body part restoration
keepOnBodyPartRestoration.description: If true, kept when the affected body part is restored.

countsAsAddedPartOrImplant.label: Counts as added part or implant
countsAsAddedPartOrImplant.description: If true, treated as an installed body part for stat and UI purposes.

blocksSocialInteraction.label: Blocks social interaction
blocksSocialInteraction.description: If true, a pawn with this hediff cannot participate in social interactions.

blocksSleeping.label: Blocks sleeping
blocksSleeping.description: If true, a pawn with this hediff cannot sleep.

overrideTooltip.label: Override tooltip
overrideTooltip.description: If set, completely replaces the default hediff tooltip.

extraTooltip.label: Extra tooltip
extraTooltip.description: Extra text appended to the hediff tooltip.

inspectString.label: Inspect string
inspectString.description: Text shown in the inspect panel when the pawn is selected.

levelIsQuantity.label: Level is quantity
levelIsQuantity.description: If true, severity is displayed as a quantity rather than a progress bar.

removeOnDeathrestStart.label: Remove on deathrest start
removeOnDeathrestStart.description: If true, removed when the pawn begins a Biotech deathrest.

preventsCrawling.label: Prevents crawling
preventsCrawling.description: If true, a downed pawn with this hediff cannot crawl.

preventsPregnancy.label: Prevents pregnancy
preventsPregnancy.description: If true, a pawn with this hediff cannot become pregnant.

preventsLungRot.label: Prevents lung rot
preventsLungRot.description: If true, prevents the pawn from contracting lung rot.

pregnant.label: Pregnant
pregnant.description: If true, this hediff represents a pregnancy state.

allowMothballIfLowPriorityWorldPawn.label: Allow mothball if low priority world pawn
allowMothballIfLowPriorityWorldPawn.description: If true, a world pawn with this hediff can be mothballed when low priority.

removeWithTags.label: Remove with tags
removeWithTags.description: Tags identifying other hediffs removed when this hediff is applied.

onlyLifeThreateningTo.label: Only life threatening to
onlyLifeThreateningTo.description: BodyPartDefs for which this hediff is life-threatening.

canAffectBionicOrImplant.label: Can affect bionic or implant
canAffectBionicOrImplant.description: If true, can be applied to artificial body parts.

alwaysShowSeverity.label: Always show severity
alwaysShowSeverity.description: If true, severity bar is always shown in the health tab.

showGizmosOnCorpse.label: Show gizmos on corpse
showGizmosOnCorpse.description: If true, ability gizmos remain visible when the pawn is dead.

defaultInstallPart.label: Default install part
defaultInstallPart.description: BodyPartDef where this implant is installed when no specific part is specified.

hairColorOverride.label: Hair color override
hairColorOverride.description: Color applied to pawn hair while active. Format: (r, g, b, a).

possiblePathways.label: Possible pathways
possiblePathways.description: Infection pathways this hediff can spread through. Element name is the InfectionPathwayDef defName; optional element text is the localized explanation shown to the player.

givesInfectionPathways.label: Gives infection pathways
givesInfectionPathways.description: InfectionPathwayDefs emitted by this pawn while infected.

duplicationAllowed.label: Duplication allowed
duplicationAllowed.description: If true, multiple instances can coexist on the same pawn.

preventsDeath.label: Prevents death
preventsDeath.description: If true, having this hediff prevents the pawn from dying from other causes.

allowedMeditationFocusTypes.label: Allowed meditation focus types
allowedMeditationFocusTypes.description: MeditationFocusDefs unlocked for pawns with this hediff.

abilities.label: Abilities
abilities.description: AbilityDefs granted while this hediff is active.

isInfection.label: Is infection
isInfection.description: If true, interacts with immunity systems.

forceRemoveOnResurrection.label: Force remove on resurrection
forceRemoveOnResurrection.description: If true, forcibly removed when the pawn is resurrected.

organicAddedBodypart.label: Organic added body part
organicAddedBodypart.description: If true, this replacement body part is organic rather than artificial.

deprioritizeHealing.label: Deprioritize healing
deprioritizeHealing.description: If true, natural healing deprioritizes this hediff.

clearsEgo.label: Clears ego
clearsEgo.description: If true, applying this hediff clears the pawn's ego.

aptitudes.label: Aptitudes
aptitudes.description: Skill aptitude adjustments. Child element names are SkillDef defNames; text is the integer level.

removeOnRedressChanceByDaysCurve.label: Remove on redress chance by days curve
removeOnRedressChanceByDaysCurve.description: Curve mapping days since last dressed to chance of removal on redress.

removeOnQuestLodgers.label: Remove on quest lodgers
removeOnQuestLodgers.description: If true, removed when a quest lodger joins the colony.

removeOnRedressIfNotOfKind.label: Remove on redress if not of kind
removeOnRedressIfNotOfKind.description: List of PawnKindDefs. If set, this hediff is removed on redress unless the pawn is one of these kinds.

displayWound.label: Display wound
displayWound.description: If true, a wound graphic is shown on the pawn's body.

woundAnchorRange.label: Wound anchor range
woundAnchorRange.description: Radius within which the wound graphic anchor is randomly placed on the body part.

defaultLabelColor.label: Default label color
defaultLabelColor.description: Color used for this hediff's label in UI. Format: (r, g, b, a).

renderNodeProperties.label: Render node properties
renderNodeProperties.description: Pawn render node configurations while this hediff is active.

skinColorOverride.label: Skin color override
skinColorOverride.description: Color replacing the pawn's skin color. Format: (r, g, b, a).

skinColorTint.label: Skin color tint
skinColorTint.description: Color multiplied with the pawn's skin color. Format: (r, g, b, a).

skinColorTintStrength.label: Skin color tint strength
skinColorTintStrength.description: How strongly the skin tint is applied (0–1).

skinShader.label: Skin shader
skinShader.description: ShaderTypeDef used to render pawn skin while active.

forceRenderTreeRecache.label: Force render tree recache
forceRenderTreeRecache.description: If true, pawn render tree cache is invalidated on add/remove.

injuryProps.label: Injury props
injuryProps.description: Physical injury properties such as bleeding rate and pain coefficients.

addedPartProps.label: Added part props
addedPartProps.description: Properties for prosthetics, bionics, and other replacement body parts.

reportStringOverrides.label: Report string overrides
reportStringOverrides.description: Custom inspect strings for specific jobs while the pawn has this hediff.

labelNoun.label: Label noun
labelNoun.description: Noun form of the hediff label for grammatical contexts.

battleStateLabel.label: Battle state label
battleStateLabel.description: Label shown in the battle log when referenced as a cause or effect.

labelNounPretty.label: Label noun (pretty)
labelNounPretty.description: Prettier noun form for formal UI contexts.

targetPrefix.label: Target prefix
targetPrefix.description: Prefix used when naming targeted body-part variants of this hediff.

basic-hediff.label: Basic hediff
basic-hediff.description: A simple hediff with one stage.

staged-hediff.label: Staged hediff
staged-hediff.description: A hediff with multiple severity-based stages.
